policy: HARNESS_88 must not install local tools, download Codex skills, connect MCP servers, or connect Codex plugins automatically. If a resource is downloaded from GitHub, the exact repository URL must be recorded here and approved by the user before download.

local.git.label: Git
local.git.notes: Official Git source repository. Platform installers may still come from official package managers or git-scm.com after user approval.

local.node.label: Node.js
local.node.notes: Official Node.js source repository. Platform installers may still come from nodejs.org or package managers after user approval.

skill.huashu-design.label: huashu-design
skill.huashu-design.notes: HTML-native design skill for high-fidelity prototypes, design directions, demos, animations, and design review.

skill.impeccable.label: impeccable
skill.impeccable.notes: Design-language resource for critique, UI audit, polish, and higher-quality agent design output.

skill.ui-ux-pro-max.label: ui-ux-pro-max-skill
skill.ui-ux-pro-max.notes: AI skill for UI/UX design intelligence, specs, and multi-platform product design reasoning.

library.gsap.label: GSAP
library.gsap.notes: GreenSock Animation Platform repository. Use only for approved motion specs or assigned frontend animation implementation.

plugin.canva.label: Canva plugin
plugin.canva.notes: Codex Canva plugin resource for mood boards, editable design assets, presentation/deck handoff, campaign visuals, and social assets when delegated.

plugin.creative-production.label: Creative Production plugin
plugin.creative-production.notes: Codex Creative Production plugin resource for delegated visual territories, mood boards, scenes, offers, ads, logos, and campaign exploration.

skill.playwright.label: Playwright MCP
skill.playwright.notes: Official Playwright MCP server repository for browser automation and UI verification.

skill.gh-cli.label: gh-cli Codex skill
skill.gh-cli.notes: Record the exact user-approved Codex skill repository URL before downloading a gh-cli skill.

skill.imagegen.label: imagegen Codex skill
skill.imagegen.notes: Record the exact user-approved Codex skill repository URL before downloading an imagegen skill.

mcp.serena.label: Serena MCP
mcp.serena.notes: Serena MCP repository for symbol-level code discovery.

mcp.context7.label: Context7 MCP
mcp.context7.notes: Context7 MCP repository for current library/framework documentation lookup.

mcp.filesystem.label: Filesystem MCP
mcp.filesystem.notes: Model Context Protocol filesystem server source path.

mcp.sqlite.label: SQLite MCP
mcp.sqlite.notes: Archived Model Context Protocol SQLite reference server source path.
